title: Bridge Essay: The neural mediators of kindness-based meditation: a theoretical model.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Formless/Absorption** (Phase 8) with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Links Formless/Absorption to mechanistic neuroscience.

**The neural mediators of kindness-based meditation: atheoretical model.** — Front Psychol. PMID: 25729374. DOI: 10.3389/fpsyg.2015.00109. Although kindness-based contemplative practices are increasingly employed by clinicians and cognitive researchers to enhance prosocial emotions, social cognitive skills, and well-being, and as atool to understand the basic workings of the social mind, we lack acoherent theoretical model with which to test the mechanisms by which kindness-based meditation may alter the brain and body. Here, we link contemplative accounts of compassion and loving-kindness practices with research from social cogn
